name: 1'4"x2'4" Welcome Grid Rectangular Outdoor Door Mat Blue - Room Essentials™
description:
Welcome guests in sophisticated style with the Welcome Grid Rectangular Outdoor Door Mat from Room Essentials™. This rectangular doormat features a black grid pattern on the brown backdrop along with the message "Welcome" for a beautiful look. Made with 100% coir, this medium-pile rug is easy to shake clean.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
